research_note.summary: The admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro chunked/source-grounding live pilot completed one non-streaming call on the same source excerpt and benchmark as the earlier pilots. The narrowed output contract produced complete parseable proposal-only JSON, but this is not a method-quality conclusion until manual content review.
what_worked: DeepSeek V4 Pro with thinking disabled produced output in one admitted non-streaming batch.
The narrowed output contract fit within the tiny pilot cap and returned all four expected top-level sections.
The raw source excerpt, prompt trace, provider request/response, and model trace remained in ignored local paths.
The committed records can carry model, prompt, source-hash, token, cost, trace-storage, and parseability metadata without committing raw source or provider payloads.
what_failed: No method success is claimed; method quality was not evaluated by this boundary review.
Manual content review has not yet judged source grounding, unsupported-claim handling, research usefulness, abstraction loss, or comparison value.
The selected local source path was absent, so the run used the recorded first-pilot source path after confirming the same admitted excerpt hash.
negative_results: A structurally complete output is still proposal-only and does not validate trading claims or source interpretation quality.
The narrowed contract intentionally omitted broad judgment abstraction and full comparison commentary, so those dimensions remain for later review.
A successful provider call is not validation, strategy evidence, product evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
reusable_by_other_labs: Compare this run with long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001 and chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_001 only after Goal 7F manual content review.
Use smaller output contracts when testing source-grounded methods under tiny output caps.
Use proposal-only live records with explicit source hashes, prompt/config hashes, token/cost metadata, and trace-storage boundaries.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat parseable JSON as method success before manual content review.
Do not expand output sections or model settings without a separate admission update.
Do not copy generated synthesis metrics or raw model text into currentness docs.
Do not substitute models silently when the admitted model is unavailable.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
